reviews.review_description:
It was very fun! I would definitely recommend to try it! Art style is very pretty to look at and I enjoyed spin on old folk tale.

It's fun to just play around with mechanics, so I would really enjoy arena survival mod, or something similar, where I can just have fun and not worry about missing on story or puzzles.

Insight from fellow developer: 
It can get a bit difficult to visually orient myself in space, since all colors are so bright, so maybe increasing outline or contrast for fake shadows could help with better visual clarity. It will also help to have easier way inside headset how to access full version. Ideally with just one click. Right now, I would have to go to my PC or search on store.
